flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Ohio Christian University are 25% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($39.8k vs $53.3k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 52% at Ohio Christian University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (816 vs 1.7k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Ohio Christian University fell 25% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2k → 862).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 16 pp at Ohio Christian University vs the 2003–2007 baseline (35.7% vs 51.5%).
